captions: acoustic folk, fingerpicked guitar, warm male vocals, storytelling, campfire feel, intimate, Americana, harmonica
indie folk, soft vocals, acoustic guitar, gentle percussion, dreamy, pastoral, introspective, bittersweet melody
singer-songwriter, raw and honest vocals, simple guitar accompaniment, emotional, stripped-down, confessional
country folk, acoustic guitar, fiddle, warm harmonies, open road feeling, heartland, nostalgic, front porch vibes
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Dust on the dashboard, miles behind
Left everything I knew to clear my mind
Windshield full of stars and open sky
Sometimes you gotta leave to find out why

[Chorus]
Rolling on, rolling on
Chasing something I can't name
Rolling on, rolling on
Nothing out here stays the same

[Verse 2]
Small town diner, coffee black
Strangers telling stories, no looking back
Every mile a little more unwind
Leaving all the heavy stuff behind

[Chorus]
Rolling on, rolling on
Chasing something I can't name
Rolling on, rolling on
Nothing out here stays the same

[Bridge]
Maybe home is not a place
Maybe home is just a feeling
You carry with you through the days

[Outro]
Rolling on
Rolling on
